step_1_image_prompt: A 25-year-old Mediterranean woman with sun-kissed deep-tan skin, green almond eyes, and brunette-with-blonde-balayage waves to her mid-back, captured in a candid amateur smartphone snapshot with natural skin texture and visible pores. She is wearing a sage green long-sleeve cropped athletic pullover with thumbholes, matching sage green high-waist leggings, white minimalist running sneakers, a thin gold chain necklace barely visible at the collarbone, hair in a low loose ponytail. She stands in a quiet corner of a premium gym, a single stationary treadmill behind her with a folded white gym towel draped over the handlebar, polished wood floor, a tall side window on her left letting in soft natural light. Standing beside the treadmill, body angled three-quarters toward the camera, weight on her left leg, composed expression mid-workout pause. Both hands are visible in the frame, not in her pockets, not behind her back, not cropped out of frame. Her left hand rests lightly on the treadmill handlebar, her right hand hangs relaxed at her side. Soft natural daylight from a side window on her left, cool with subtle warm undertone, neutral wash across the scene. Shot on Sony A7IV 35mm lens shallow depth of field. Real photograph, not AI-generated, no model pose, candid moment. Composed mid-workout pause mood, palette of sage green, polished wood warm tone, soft daylight white. Reference image is the persona — preserve her face, eye color, eye shape, brow shape, nose shape, lip shape, jaw line, and hair color exactly. Do not improvise her face.
